content:
Issue: Deployment failures, rollback required

Symptoms:
- Application error 403
- Version 3.0 affected
- Consistent occurrence
- Some users affected

Root Cause:
Health check failing

Solution:
Update health check

Steps to Resolve:
1. Put app in maintenance mode
2. Backup database
3. Update health check
4. Verify fix
5. Deploy to production
6. Monitor logs

Prevention:
- Improve testing
- Security audit

Status: Resolved
Resolution Time: 15 minutes

Issue: Upgrade from 2.1 to 2.2 failed

Symptoms:
- Application error 503
- Version 2.2 affected
- Random occurrence
- All users affected

Root Cause:
Dependency version conflict

Solution:
Run schema migration

Steps to Resolve:
1. Stop the application
2. Export data
3. Run schema migration
4. Run smoke tests
5. Restart application
6. Monitor logs

Prevention:
- Update documentation
- Security audit

Status: Resolved
Resolution Time: 15 minutes

Issue: Application crashes with error 502

Symptoms:
- Application error 502
- Version 1.5 affected
- Random occurrence
- Some users affected

Root Cause:
Memory leak in version 1.5

Solution:
Fix code and redeploy

Steps to Resolve:
1. Put app in maintenance mode
2. Export data
3. Fix code and redeploy
4. Test in staging
5. Scale up replicas
6. Verify metrics

Prevention:
- Improve testing
- Code review
